title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SIASI CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA JULKANAIN TAUP ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2909 / 60 OG No. 43, 6978 (October 26, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3919, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SIASI CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA JULKANAIN TAUP ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Siasi Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Siasi, Province of Sulu, is hereby changed to Panglima Julkanain Taup Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
